Hello ladies and gentlemen. My name is Joshua Giles and I am the creative director for Gym Launch. I'm going to show you how to make this flyer today. So you should have gotten the example which already has it all filled in which is the template that I made and so the only difference that you'll notice is at the top it says prestige labs plus dream body and just dream body. So you'll be making a private and public poster I'm assuming so those are the two examples. Now you're going to get just the whitewash version which looks like this and this is what I'm going to show you how to do. So you're going to go to Canva.com and create your account. You can create logging in by Facebook, Google+, or an email. Once you have your account you're going to come up to this use custom dimensions in the top right corner. You're going to click on that in 1728 by 2304 is what you're going to be using. Make sure that this stays on pixel and then go ahead and click design. Once you get into here you're just going to take that download that you have of the whitewash version and you're just going to drag it over onto this side and it will upload it automatically for you. Once it's uploaded just drag the photo in here put it up in one of the corners and then you can drag it down and fit it right into it and now this is basically your template to use to fill in all of your information. And filling in your information is super simple. All you do is you go to text, click on a little add a little bit of body text once you come in here. So say we want to put dream body fitness right here. Type that in and then we are going to turn that to white and then the font that we used was League Spartan. How fitting right? So League Spartan and then what you'll do is when you see those four arrows that means you can drag it and then there will be these little purple alignments for you to use to actually align it centered. So if you notice it looks like some of the words are actually squishing together so if you select it all and go to spacing you can space the letters out a little bit and that will just help with the aesthetic of it and then you know keeping it smaller makes it look sexy in this position. So now once you get down here and say you're going to add another text body of some sort and you bring it down in here just go ahead and hit return and then make sure it is left side spaced and then that's where you can actually edit and drag it around to put it by the icons. What I would suggest is where it says registration and then Friday I'd make those two different text boxes so you can capital one and then change the color of it as well. Otherwise that's it. It's pretty simple. You'll just enter in all the words that way and then you will just go up here to download and then PNG recommended download it and you're good to go. If you have any questions Google and YouTube are going to be your best friends so good luck everybody crush it.
